patterns_recognized: Large f5_full_delta (>0.15) + positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap (pick-side pen worse) is a reliable double-down SKIP signal — confirmed 5/26 TB@BAL (6-1 loss) and WSH@CLE (6-3 loss); do not CONFIRM full-game picks where the bullpen-carry thesis conflicts with an inferior pick-side pen.

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA against + PQI against pick) is unreliable as a high-confidence directional predictor: 0-for-4 on 5/25, 2-for-2 on 5/26; cumulative ~55-60%; treat as moderate negative factor requiring corroboration before DOWNGRADE or OVERRIDE.

Stress-flag stacks (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) correctly suppress stake but are poor direction-reversal triggers — 5/25 showed 3-of-4 DOWNGRADEs on triple-flag stacks wrong directionally; keep them as stake dampers only.

F1_xera_gap* (thin-sample asterisk) on the pick-side SP at sub-55% pick_prob is an insufficient directional anchor — 5/26 LAA@DET (F1*=1.53, pick_prob=0.525) produced a 10-6 LAA blowout; F3 or PQI corroboration does not fully compensate for thin-sample xERA.

HARD CAP 6 calibrator hallucination (edge_pp > +25pp) consistently coincides with market pricing dramatically against the model pick — today SEA@OAK fair_prob=0.183 for OAK, ARI@SF model pick_prob 79.5% vs grade D; cap is structurally correct and should not be re-litigated.

MIA @ TOR.reasoning: D-grade with SP edge 1.83 xERA AGAINST MIA (Gausman >> Pérez) and PQI against (Δ=+23.9) both oppose the MIA pick direction. Market has fair_prob=0.360 for MIA — a 20pp gap vs model's 55.8%. calibration_caution_18_25pp flag on +19.82pp edge. BvP is all SMALL_SAMPLE with no directional conviction. Multiple structural signals align against MIA; SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against moderate-negative
calibration_caution_18_25pp on edge>18pp
market-gap as negative anchor

WSH @ CLE.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 correctly fires on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0147 (CLE pen slightly worse). f5_full_delta=0.2939 — CLE dominates F5 at 84.7% but only barely wins full game at 55.4%, requiring a bullpen flip from an inferior pen. Per 5/26 WSH@CLE and TB@BAL postgames, this profile (large delta + pen disadvantage) reliably merits SKIP. WSH also won yesterday in this series 6-3. Coin-flip territory after caps.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta>0.15 + positive bullpen-gap = SKIP
consecutive-series loss recency (WSH won 6-3 yesterday)
HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold confirmed 5/20

STL @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 fires (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0051, MIL pen slightly worse). f5_full_delta=0.1681 — STL wins F5 at 65.2% but MIL wins full at 51.6%, again requiring a bullpen flip from a worse pen. HARD CAP 10 fires on pick_prob=0.509. Chad Patrick (STL) is a debut or thin-sample SP — MIL BvP vs Patrick is all NO_DATA. edge +16.03pp outside [4,15]pp; fair_prob=0.355 for MIL indicates market disagrees strongly.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta>0.15 + pen disadvantage SKIP profile
HARD CAP 7 + HARD CAP 10 double-fire
thin-sample opposing SP with no BvP data reduces conviction

SEA @ OAK.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 fires on edge_pp=+40.62pp — textbook calibrator hallucination. Market fair_prob=0.183 for OAK (vs model's 58.9%) is a 40pp gap confirming the hallucination. SEA BvP vs Jeffrey Springs shows Rodriguez OWNER (shrunk 0.791) and Refsnyder OWNER (shrunk 0.946) — SEA has the stronger BvP profile, further undermining OAK direction. Cap correctly prevents any stake.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 6 calibrator hallucination validated
market 40pp gap confirms cap
SEA BvP owners vs Springs noted but no override on zero-stake game

ARI @ SF.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 fires on edge_pp=+27.68pp. Pre-cap grade D (-2): SP edge 0.40 xERA AGAINST ARI with small-sample SP flag (min_pa=94 for Michael Soroka). f5_full_delta=0.4104 is the largest on the slate — SF dominates F5 at 61.6% but ARI wins full at 79.5%. ARI had consecutive wins at SF on 5/25 and 5/26, but the hallucinated edge makes directional confidence invalid. Pre-cap D grade undermines direction.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 6 calibrator hallucination
pre-cap D grade undermines direction despite consecutive series wins
small-sample SP flag on pick-side SP

PHI @ SD.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on negative edge (-5.28pp) — market prices PHI at fair_prob=0.584, more bullish than model's 53.1%. F1_xera_gap=2.71 supports PHI (Sánchez >> Buehler) and PQI=-25.0 strongly confirms PHI direction. However confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue, and Tatis is OWNER vs Sánchez (12 PA, shrunk 0.865). Market already prices PHI direction fully — no edge to stake; cap enforcement is EV-correct.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement
market pricing above model on pick direction
Tatis OWNER vs pick-side SP noted; insufficient standalone OVERRIDE per 5/25 lesson

TB @ BAL.reasoning: Near-coin-flip (50.1%) with triple stress flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade). f5_full_delta=0.196 — BAL dominates F5 at 69.5% but TB picks up full game at 50.1%, requiring a bullpen flip from a worse pen (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.005 for TB). 5/26 TB@BAL with near-identical profile lost 6-1. No BvP data available. HARD CAP 10 correctly fires at the absolute bottom of conviction bands.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta>0.15 + pen disadvantage SKIP
triple stress flags suppress directional confidence
5/26 TB@BAL 6-1 loss with same profile

LAA @ DET.reasoning: DET at 62.9% is the highest-conviction non-LAD non-SKIP pick above the bottom bucket. Two F-signals (F1_xera_gap=1.12* + F3=1769.2), PQI +10.8, and tight Stage 1/2 agreement (f5_full_delta=0.021). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0005 is essentially neutral pens. HARD CAP 7 fired at near-zero threshold; 5/20 inaugural near-zero firing was direction-correct. Triple stress flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) are stake dampers not direction reversers per 5/25 lesson. F1* risk acknowledged but pick_prob=62.9% provides better structural support than 5/26 LAA@DET (52.5%).
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold noted but not overriding at 62.9%
stress flags as stake-suppressors not direction reversers (5/25 lesson)
F1* asterisk risk at higher pick_prob than the 5/26 loss case

CHC @ PIT.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on negative edge (-1.65pp). F1_xera_gap=0.94* has the thin-sample asterisk on Bubba Chandler (young PIT SP), and no BvP data is available for either team. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0037 (PIT pen slightly worse). confidence_downgrade=True. pick_prob=0.510 is at the very floor of marginal-favorite range. No qualitative reason to rescue this from SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement
F1* thin-sample with no BvP = no confidence boost
bottom-bucket pick_prob 51.0%

ATL @ BOS.reasoning: D-grade: SP edge 1.71 xERA AGAINST BOS (Elder >> Connelly Early) and PQI Δ=-25.2 against BOS both oppose the pick. ATL has Acuña, Olson, Albies — dangerous lineup vs a xERA-disadvantaged home SP. BOS bullpen is better (gap=-0.0135) but f5_full_delta=0.167 shows BOS dominates F5 at 71.2%, consistent with a SP-driven F5 advantage that evaporates in the bullpen era. W. Contreras is OWNER vs Elder (13 PA, shrunk 0.805) for BOS but one OWNER is insufficient to override D-grade dual signals.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against as moderate negative
single OWNER BvP insufficient to override D-grade (5/25 lesson)
Elder xERA edge for ATL is primary directional concern

CIN @ NYM.reasoning: D-grade with heavy signals against CIN: SP edge 2.06 xERA AGAINST CIN (Brazobán >> Abbott) and PQI Δ=+39.4 against CIN — the largest PQI headwind on the slate. f5_full_delta=0.2393 (NYM dominates F5 at 66.2%, CIN needs full-game bullpen flip). Juan Soto is OWNER vs Abbott (12 PA, shrunk 0.813) — a meaningful soft-negative for CIN's SP effectiveness. CIN BvP vs Brazobán is entirely empty. Multiple structural factors oppose CIN direction.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against with largest PQI headwind on slate
Soto OWNER vs pick-side SP is soft negative
f5_full_delta>0.15 without pen advantage for CIN

MIN @ CHW.reasoning: HARD CAP 8 fires (pick_prob=0.508 in (0.50,0.52], edge=+0.80pp ≤ +12pp). HARD CAP 10 also fires. F3_swing_take_gap=3586.4 is the sole F-signal with no F1/F2 corroboration. confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue. CHW lost to MIN 5-3 yesterday in this same series. CHW bullpen is marginally better (gap=-0.0013) but all BvP data is NO_DATA. Edge of +0.80pp is structurally unstakeable.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 8 + HARD CAP 10 double-fire at 50.8%
consecutive-series loss recency (CHW lost 5-3 yesterday)
sole F3 signal without corroboration on coin-flip

NYY @ KC.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA: Gerrit Cole has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — no SP quality estimate possible. Same threshold that correctly prevented picks on CHC@PIT 5/26 (PIT won 12-1) and SEA@OAK 5/26. No directional call is made. Zero-data SP protection is non-negotiable; no qualitative override can substitute for absent Statcast data.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA zero-data threshold validated 5/26 CHC@PIT 12-1 blowout
zero-data SP protection prevents false precision on either direction

HOU @ TEX.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on negative edge (-5.37pp). HOU-TEX series has been violently volatile: TEX picked on 5/25 → HOU won 9-0; HOU picked on 5/26 → TEX won 10-7. Now TEX is picked again — the consecutive-reversal pattern flags this series as structurally unstable. acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade. Jacob deGrom pitching for TEX is positive qualitative context, but negative market edge indicates market has already priced the matchup.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement
consecutive-day series reversal pattern (5/26 postgame lesson)
market pricing already incorporates known deGrom matchup

COL @ LAD.reasoning: Strongest directional conviction on the slate. Shohei Ohtani pitching at home with triple F-signal (F1=6.57, F2=0.052, F3=12071.3) and PQI=+63.7 — largest SP advantage and largest PQI on today's slate. LAD has won both prior games in this COL series (5/25: 5-3, 5/26: 15-6). f5_full_delta=0.152 is manageable. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0008 is essentially neutral. Negative edge (-16.48pp) correctly prevents stake — market at 83.9% vs model's 67.4%. Direction is unambiguous; zero-staked per prior HARD CAP 1 validations.
lessons_applied: triple F-signal + Ohtani = highest directional conviction
negative-edge enforcement correct even on directionally-correct DIAMOND picks (5/25 5-3, 5/26 15-6 wins)
consecutive-series wins reinforce structural LAD edge vs COL
